sgTip: Tidus and Wakka can push further along their starting paths here — grabbing Tidus's Cheer node and Wakka's Dark Attack node now pays off immediately in Luca.

subLocations.name: S.S. Winno
subLocations.prose: Below deck, grab the Hi-Potion from the chest in your cabin, then speak to O'aka — with more Gil on hand than the S.S. Liki crossing, this is a good moment to push your cumulative loan toward 1,001 Gil for the best discount. On deck, pick up Al Bhed Primer Vol. V from the deckhouse near the stairs, then move to the rear of the boat to interrupt a conversation between Yuna and the Luca Goers. Head upstairs to overhear Lulu and Wakka talking — their backstory is revealed in small pieces, so go up and down multiple times to hear all of it. When ready, save at the Save Sphere below deck first, then examine the blitzball on the upper deck. Press the D-pad in the direction shown for each on-screen prompt to complete the Jecht Shot. Fail without a save and the move is gone permanently — so save first.
